heading: Limitations on authorization of appropriations
label: 625 Limitations on authorization of appropriations
text: To carry out this subpart (other than sections 626, 627, and 628b of this title), there are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary not more than $325,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 625, , as added , , ; amended , , ; , , ; , , , defined terms for purposes of this subchapter, prior to repeal by , §§ 6(a), 12(a), , , 1255, effective , and applicable to payments under this part and part E of this subchapter for calendar quarters beginning on or after such date.act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title IV, § 425Pub.
